wave: SCAN-RANKBY-REFINEMENTS-W1 (CH1 oiChangeWindow; CH3 oiBasis — appended at CH3)
summary: Additive input params modifying the oi_change lens. CH1 adds `oiChangeWindow` (1h|4h|24h, default 24h). CH3 adds `oiBasis` (notional|contracts, default notional) + the `oi_change_basis` per-call echo. Both default to the SCAN-RANKBY-W3 behaviour ⇒ byte-identical when omitted. tools/list unchanged (9); both are params, not new lenses/tools. The rankBy lens set (RANK_BY_VALUES) is UNCHANGED.

added_params.name: oiChangeWindow
added_params.semantics: OI-delta window for rankBy=oi_change. Invalid → MCP zod rejection (same default-deny as exchange/timeframe). Ignored by other lenses.

added_params_ch3_pending.name: oiBasis
added_params_ch3_pending.semantics: OI-delta basis for rankBy=oi_change. 'contracts' = base-coin-unit OI (price-independent). Ignored by other lenses.

input_schema_additive.note: Additive only — no existing param changed or removed. Default keyword on the new params is a documented additive inputSchema diff (behavior-preserving; no client cache-refresh / tool rename needed).

calls_item.note: CH3 adds `oi_change_basis` ('notional'|'contracts') to the oi_change lens echo, alongside the existing oi_change_pct + oi_change_window. Present only for rankBy=oi_change. The full calls_item allow-list is in scan_trade_calls-rankby-shape-snapshot-2026-06-27.json + the digest snapshot.
